plugins.microphonePermission: Rabbit Dairy records a short voice note explaining why you made a purchase.

plugins.photosPermission: Rabbit Dairy reads bank or mobile-money statements you upload.
plugins.cameraPermission: Rabbit Dairy scans bank or mobile-money statements and receipts.

plugins.microphonePermission: Rabbit Dairy listens so you can log a purchase by voice.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Rabbit Dairy transcribes your spoken note on-device, live.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Rabbit Dairy uses Face ID to unlock the app.
